ddls:
CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library (e.g., Caffe, Keras, TensorFlow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the library */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the latest version of the library */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the official documentation */,
  "community_size" INTEGER /* Number of contributors or users in the community */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the library was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES library_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison result */,
  "library1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first library being compared */,
  "library2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second library being compared */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Processing time of the libraries */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the libraries */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the libraries */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the comparison result */,
  "test_case" TEXT /* Description of the test case used for the comparison */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the comparison result was submitted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_library1_id FOREIGN KEY ("library1_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_library2_id FOREIGN KEY ("library2_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library used in the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the library version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the library version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., processing time, memory usage, accuracy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., seconds, MB, %) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_per_metric" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison result */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the comparison result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case used for the metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the metric result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_per_metric_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_per_metric_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES comparison_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended library */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the recommendation */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
